## Improvements

- Keep discover and rank filters stable while refreshing only the list section.
- Add inline loading feedback for discover paging and rank switching without blanking the whole page.
- Restore scroll position more reliably when switching pages and coming back.
- Add subtle page fade transitions without interfering with discover/rank in-place refreshes.
- Simplify the rank page filter layout by removing the extra helper cards.
- Update the app icon to the new rounded avatar and surface it in the README.

## Fixes

- Fix discover filter changes causing full-page reload flashes.
- Fix discover pagination causing the whole page to reset instead of only updating the content list.
- Fix rank tab and period changes causing full-page refreshes.
- Fix page transitions breaking saved list scroll position and returning users to the top.

## Packaging

- Bump the app version to `1.1.0+2`.
- Rename the Android / iOS / macOS app identifier to `com.huangusaki.easycopy`.
- Remove the Windows target from the repository.
- Add custom GitHub release note support to the Android release workflow.

## Upgrade Note

- Because the app identifier changed, Android users on the old package must uninstall the previous build before installing `1.1.0`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/huangusaki/EasyCopy/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
